blockedAssertions.blockedBy: Infrastructure limitation: database inspection requires direct sql.js access not available via user-testing-validator. Validation requires IPC endpoint to expose database schema.
Infrastructure limitation: database insert test requires direct sql.js access not available via user-testing-validator. Validation requires IPC endpoint to execute SQL.
Infrastructure limitation: native file Save dialog triggered by Export Excel cannot be captured by accessibility tree. Cannot verify downloaded file content.
Infrastructure limitation: native file Open dialog triggered by Import Excel cannot be captured by accessibility tree. Cannot select aresta.xlsx for import.

notes.uiVerification: Verified BlokListPage displays 8 columns (Kode Blok, Nama, Tahun Tanam, Luas (Ha), Pokok, SPH, Bulan Tanam, Status Tanaman). Verified status filter has TM, TBM, TTM, TLS options. Verified BlokFormPage has Pokok, SPH, Bulan Tanam, Status Tanaman fields.
notes.passedFromBlokFix: VAL-BLOK-003, VAL-BLOK-004, VAL-BLOK-005 were validated at blok-fix milestone and confirmed working.
notes.blockedAssertionsAreInfrastructure: The 4 blocked assertions require either direct database access or native file dialog handling which are outside the scope of user-testing-validator capabilities.
